name: EC2.shop API
description: Query EC2.shop for AWS EC2 instance specifications, on-demand pricing, monthly estimates, and spot prices with region, filter, and sort controls.

auth.hint: No authentication is required. Set the Accept header to json to receive the documented JSON response instead of the default text table.

tools.name: list_ec2_prices
tools.description: List and compare AWS EC2 instance specifications and prices.

params.name: accept
params.description: Set to json to return the documented JSON array rather than a text table.

params.name: region
params.description: AWS region identifier, for example us-west-2; the live service currently exposes the supported region list.

params.name: filter
params.description: Comma-separated keywords and comparisons such as ssd,mem>=32,cpu<=4; prefix a term with - to exclude it.

params.name: sort
params.description: Comma-separated sort fields; prefix a field with - for descending order, for example -price,mem.
